name: albumentationsx-mcp
description: Preview, validate, and tune AlbumentationsX augmentation pipelines from Codex.

interface.longDescription: Use AlbumentationsX from Codex to discover transforms, validate pipelines, render bounded local previews, capture feedback, and export reviewed augmentation workflows.
defaultPrompt: Preview a bounded local image dataset and tune its augmentation pipeline.
Inspect this augmentation pipeline and explain risky transforms.
Build a small review packet for this computer-vision dataset.
